General.Name: Vico International Holdings
General.Description: Vico International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution of lubricants and petrochemicals in Hong Kong, Vietnam, Dubai, Thailand, Singapore, and India. The company offers diesel; lubricant oils, including self-branded lubricant and third-party branded lubricant oils; and other petrochemicals, such as bitumen, as well as kerosene. It is also involved in the provision of fleet card and transportation services; and property holding activities. The company was formerly known as Rico International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Vico International Holdings Limited in May 2017. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. Vico International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Max Fortune Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Billion Plaza II, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong
